hero.title: Turning Data into Strategy and Ideas into Impact.
hero.intro:
I've never really done things on the typical timeline and I believe that's my greatest asset.

I skipped a grade, graduated at 16, and spent my gap year traveling and volunteering before I ever set foot in a college classroom. I have always moved with ambition, but never without intention. Since then, I have not stopped. Every summer I have shown up somewhere new: a different state, a different country, a different industry. Dallas, New York City, Portugal. Each experience made me sharper, more adaptable, and more confident in rooms I had never been in before.

At VCU I study Marketing, Data Analytics, and Sales, but my real education has happened in the work itself. I am obsessed with brands that make people feel something and partnerships that create real mutual value, and that combination of sales instinct and marketing curiosity is what drives me.

jobs.blurb: Drove full-cycle partnership outreach and closed high-impact collaborations that expanded student access while improving outbound efficiency with AI-assisted workflows.

jobs.company: VCU Office of Innovation & Strategic Design
jobs.meta: Innovation & Strategic Design Fellow | Richmond, VA
jobs.blurb: Built and scaled a new innovation fellowship model by leading partner development, digital outreach, and cross-sector collaboration with university and state stakeholders.

jobs.meta: Omnichannel Education & Sales Intern | New York City, NY
jobs.blurb: Turned market intelligence and account operations into executive-ready recommendations that strengthened omnichannel strategy and expanded engagement in underserved segments.

jobs.meta: Senior Associate Marketing Intern | Dallas, TX
jobs.blurb: Translated campaign performance data into ROI-focused marketing recommendations and stakeholder communications that improved planning clarity and execution alignment.

items.name: Alpha Kappa Psi Fraternity
items.blurb: Lead a 68-member chapter and a 7-person executive board while managing a $10K budget and driving recruitment strategies that increased outcomes by 40%.

items.name: Student Managed Investment Portfolio (SMIP)
items.blurb: Analyze consumer staples opportunities with Bloomberg and IBISWorld research and collaborate with a 40-analyst team to support decisions for a $415K portfolio.

gapYear.title: Gap Year Journey
gapYear.blurb: Before college, I spent a year living in Hawaii and Colombia, volunteering and working with local organizations to give back to the communities that welcomed me. In Hawaii, I participated in beach and trail cleanups, working alongside conservation groups to preserve the natural spaces that locals and visitors depend on. In Colombia, I taught English through community education programs, helping open doors for people in communities where language access makes a real difference. That year taught me how to connect with people from all walks of life, how to show up for something bigger than yourself, and how to find purpose in the everyday effort of building something good. It is not something I talk about often, but it shaped who I am more than I can put into words.
